heading: Establishment and purpose of advisory committees
label: 1008 Establishment and purpose of advisory committees

children.text: specifically authorized by statute or by the President; or

determined as a matter of formal record, by the head of the agency involved after consultation with the Administrator, with timely notice published in the Federal Register, to be in the public interest in connection with the performance of duties imposed on that agency by law.

children.heading: .—Purpose of Advisory Committees
children.label: b .—Purpose of Advisory Committees
children.text: Unless otherwise specifically provided by statute or Presidential directive, advisory committees shall be utilized solely for advisory functions. Determinations of action to be taken and policy to be expressed with respect to matters upon which an advisory committee reports or makes recommendations shall be made solely by the President or an officer of the Federal Government.

children.label: A
children.text: with the Administrator in the case of Presidential advisory committees; or

children.label: i
children.text: the head of the agency to whom the advisory committee reports; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the standing committees of the Senate and House of Representatives having legislative jurisdiction over the agency to which the advisory committee reports.

children.label: B
children.text: the committee’s objectives and the scope of its activity;

children.label: C
children.text: the period of time necessary for the committee to carry out its purposes;

children.label: D
children.text: the agency or official to whom the committee reports;

children.label: E
children.text: the agency responsible for providing the necessary support for the committee;

children.label: F
children.text: a description of the duties for which the committee is responsible, and, if the duties are not solely advisory, a specification of the authority for the duties;

children.label: G
children.text: the estimated annual operating costs for the committee in dollars and person-years;

children.label: H
children.text: the estimated number and frequency of committee meetings;

children.label: I
children.text: the committee’s termination date, if less than 2 years from the date of the committee’s establishment; and

children.label: J
children.text: the date the charter is filed.

children.heading: .—Copy of charter to library of congress
children.label: 3 .—Copy of charter to library of congress
children.text: A copy of the advisory committee charter shall be furnished to the Library of Congress.
